meta.title: CD Español Wiesbaden
meta.description: Club website for CD Español Wiesbaden.

footer.themeNote: Official club website of CD Español Wiesbaden.

hero.title: CD Español Wiesbaden
hero.description: CD Español Wiesbaden stands for tradition, togetherness and a passion for football. With our teams and a strong club community, we bring football in the spirit of Spain to Wiesbaden.
hero.panelDescription: CD Español Wiesbaden brings together players of all ages and football fans united by genuine team spirit and shared success.

shop.title: Flyeralarm Sports for the club look
shop.description: The team shop makes it easy to order CDE apparel yourself. Club logos and selected products are already prepared, so getting started is straightforward.

selfService.title: Order it yourself
selfService.description: Every order is handled directly through Flyeralarm Sports. Members, fans and families can choose and order products independently.

collection.title: Training wear and fan gear
collection.description: The shop already includes a first selection of apparel and club items that carry the CDE look into match days, training and everyday life.

branding.title: CDE branding already prepared
branding.description: The club logo and team shop structure are already in place so apparel and the club identity stay visually consistent.

fanJersey.title: Fan jersey
fanJersey.description: The fan jersey brings the club colours into everyday life and is a strong entry point into the CDE look.

warmupShirt.title: Warm-up shirt
warmupShirt.description: A functional piece for warm-up, training or leisure with a clear club connection.

trainingTop.title: Training top
trainingTop.description: Sporty upper-body gear for sessions on the pitch and for the way to match day.

socks.title: Socks
socks.description: Even the smaller pieces are part of the club image and complete the overall look.

teams.title: Our teams
teams.description: Die Erste and Die Zweite represent ambition, development and togetherness at CDE. On the teams page you can find squad photos and coaching staff.

membership.title: Become a member
membership.description: The membership page includes fee information, the membership application, key points from the statutes and the registration process for joining the club.

cta.title: Jump straight to the team shop
cta.description: Anyone who wants to order the club look right away can head directly to the CDE team shop on Flyeralarm Sports.

hero.title: Our Teams
hero.subtitle: The sporting core of CD Espanol Wiesbaden
hero.description: From the title-winning first team to the newly built second side, this is where the club's history, community and sporting ambition meet on the pitch.

founding.title: Pioneer in Hesse
founding.description: CDE became the first Spanish football club in an official DFB league in Hesse.

promotion.title: Promotion in 2013
promotion.description: After an intense finish to the season, the club won promotion to Kreisliga B through the playoffs.

championship.title: Champions in 2025
championship.description: In May 2025 the first team won the Kreisliga B title and earned promotion to Kreisliga A.

first.title: Die Erste
first.description: Die Erste stands for ambitious senior football, precise structures and a presence that combines sporting clarity with the club identity.

second.title: Die Zweite
second.description: Die Zweite represents unity, development and reliability. Its presentation intentionally follows the same visual system as the first team.

training.title: When and where we train
training.schedule: Wednesday and Friday from 7:00 p.m. to 9:00 p.m.
training.description: Training takes place regularly in both teams and is open to all members.

trainingForm.label: Trial session
trainingForm.title: Quick sign-up
trainingForm.description: With just a few details, you can prepare an email for your trial training session right away.
trainingForm.helper: Clicking Send opens your mail app with a prepared message.

mail.subject: Trial training request
mail.intro: Hello, I would like to sign up for a trial training session.

organization.title: SpielerPlus
organization.description: We use SpielerPlus for managing our teams, coordinating training and match schedules, and communicating between coaching staff and players.

hero.title: Board
hero.subtitle: The people behind direction, structure and identity
hero.description: The board forms the organisational backbone of the club. This is where responsibility, club culture and the long-term development of CD Espanol Wiesbaden come together.

identity.title: Protecting identity
identity.description: The board safeguards the club's heritage, values and visibility both internally and externally.

community.title: Organising community
community.description: From match operations to club life, strong structures create the framework for sporting and social togetherness.

continuity.title: Building continuity
continuity.description: Sustainable growth comes from reliability, responsibility and a view beyond a single season.

presidium.label: Presidium
presidium.title: Strategic leadership of the club
presidium.description: This level carries the highest responsibility for direction, public presence and the long-term development of CD Espanol Wiesbaden.

finance.label: Treasury + Secretary
finance.title: Core responsibility in day-to-day operations
finance.description: This area combines financial reliability, documentation and the formal organisation of the club.

advisors.label: Advisors
advisors.title: Shared responsibility across the club
advisors.description: The advisors support the club across multiple areas and strengthen the organisation across the board.

special.label: Special roles
special.title: Dedicated functions and tasks
special.description: This section is reserved for clearly defined special responsibilities that can be specified in more detail later.

notes.andreas: Supports the sporting side 24/7 with expertise and wholehearted commitment
notes.carsten: Coordination and responsibility for all club matters
notes.manolo: Responsible for bookkeeping and financial matters
notes.martin: Qualified as a DFB club manager C.
notes.sebastianGeiss: Coordinator and expert for association affairs, funding and infrastructure development
notes.sebastianLachenit: Contact person for refereeing and our insurance against points deductions
notes.sascha: Records the results of meetings in written minutes

boardPage.memberNote: Specific titles and responsibilities can be added later.

hero.title: Membership
hero.subtitle: Fees, framework and statutes at a glance
hero.description: Becoming a member of CD Espanol Wiesbaden means supporting not only the sporting programme, but also the club community, club life and its long-term development.

licensedTraining.title: Qualified training
licensedTraining.description: Training sessions and support are led by qualified staff with relevant licences and experience in club football.

health.title: Fun and health
health.description: Regular activity, shared training and enjoyment of the game strengthen fitness, wellbeing and motivation.

integration.title: Multilingual integration
integration.description: The club builds community across languages and creates an open space for exchange, integration and belonging.

reduced.title: Reduced
reduced.note: For reduced memberships in line with the currently applicable club rules.

standard.title: Standard
standard.note: The regular fee for a standard club membership.

family.title: Family
family.note: For families who want to support and accompany the club together.

pricing.label: Fee overview
pricing.title: Membership fees
pricing.description: The current fee structure follows the statutes and gives a clear overview of the monthly membership contributions.

documents.label: Documents
documents.title: Membership application and statutes
documents.description: Here you can find both the multilingual membership application and the current statutes of the club as PDF files.

statute.label: Key points
statute.title: What membership at CDE means
statute.description: A few central rules from the statutes help members understand the rights, obligations and spirit of membership right away.

process.label: Process
process.title: How the registration works
process.description: These steps help prepare the path into the club. Depending on the personal situation, some points may be relevant or optional.

deregister.title: Leave previous club
deregister.description: If needed, deregister from the previous club on time. This is optional and is typically possible until 30 June or 31 December of each year.

application.title: Submit application
application.description: Complete the membership application, sign it and then submit it to the club.

payment.title: Fees and one-time admission charge
payment.description: Pay the membership fee according to the statutes. In addition, there is a one-time admission fee of EUR 55, which includes a T-shirt and a sweatshirt for match days.

documents.title: Keep documents ready
documents.description: If you are not an EU citizen, your passport and/or registration certificate should be available for the registration process.

purpose.title: Non-profit purpose
purpose.description: The club exclusively and directly pursues non-profit purposes and especially promotes football, sport, play and community club life.

admission.title: Admission and membership types
admission.description: The club has regular, youth, supporting and honorary members. Admission is made in writing, and for members under 18 only with written consent from a legal guardian. The board decides on admission.

participation.title: Participation and obligations
participation.description: Members are entitled to vote at assemblies. Anyone who falls behind with payments for more than six months loses the right to take part in club events and to exercise voting rights.

leaving.title: Leaving and end of membership
leaving.description: Resignation is possible in writing at the end of a calendar year and must be declared at least six weeks in advance. Long-term arrears can lead to removal from the register of members.

hero.title: Imprint
hero.subtitle: Mandatory information and contact
hero.description: This page contains the club's key legal information, contact details and the most important public contact points related to CD Espanol Wiesbaden.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.content: Carsten Zillmann is responsible for the content. The technical implementation is handled by Florian Treder.

association.title: Association
association.registry: Association register at Wiesbaden local court, association no.: 2133
